headline: Jet-medium structure leads the day, with strong ALICE jet-energy-flow data and new in-medium splitting and track-function phenomenology.
strongest_paper: Modification of jet-energy flow in heavy-ion collisions
top_takeaway: The strongest trend is convergence between new jet-substructure measurements and sharper theory tools for jet-medium dynamics.
